# Creating and Testing Reindex Functionality

I'll help you create a skill, reindex the notes, and then search to verify the indexing worked. Let me execute these steps:

## Step 1: Creating the Skill

```python
tool_caller.call(
    "notes.create",
    payload={
        "title": "Reindex Test Skill",
        "type": "skill",
        "scope": "global",
        "description": "Testing reindex functionality",
        "skill_level": "beginner",
        "triggers": ["reindex-test-unique"],
        "required_tools": []
    }
)
```

## Step 2: Running Notes Reindex

```python
tool_caller.call(
    "notes_reindex",
    payload={}
)
```

## Step 3: Searching for the Skill

```python
tool_caller.call(
    "notes.search",
    payload={
        "query": "reindex-test-unique"
    }
)
```
